TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Brown, title = Jim_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Brown} }

S.FORM: Jim Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1912, ryax sa tay nqu tay, Jim Brown , squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Jim Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1912, ryax sa tay nqu tay, Jim Brown , squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj nqu taj, *im βrown , s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
